title: Cepheid - Point-of-Care Molecular Diagnostics
problem: Molecular testing requires sending samples to central labs, causing multi-day delays in treatment decisions
solution: GeneXpert system provides automated, on-demand molecular testing at point of care in under 90 minutes
technology: PCR molecular diagnostics, cartridge-based testing, automated analysis
regulatory_notes: Multiple FDA 510(k) clearances, CLIA waived tests
